scopeNote.zh: 一个用于演示基于证据的架构提案的虚构支持助手；不包含客户、生产或个人数据。
scopeNote.en: A fictional support assistant used to demonstrate evidence-backed architecture proposals. No customer, production, or personal data is included.

current.label: Current architecture
current.description: Inspect the published baseline and its evidence.

target.label: Target draft
target.description: Review the proposed architecture before it can be published.

compare.label: Compare
compare.description: See the structural and semantic differences between baseline and draft.
